nodes.label: sanad-lawyer-calendar.png
nodes.description: UI screenshot of the Sanad legal app's Unified Calendar view (التقويم الموحد) in Lawyer mode. RTL Arabic interface showing a consolidated schedule of case hearings, tasks, compliance deadlines, and contact calls. Displays time-filter tabs (Today/Tomorrow/This Week/Next 30 Days/Previous), event-type summary badges, and a date-grouped event list. Sidebar navigation is visible on the right. A PWA install prompt is shown. Date shown: Sunday 21 June 2026.

nodes.label: Unified Calendar Feature
nodes.description: A consolidated calendar aggregating all appointment types in one place: case hearings, tasks, compliance deadlines, and contact/call events. Supports time-range filters and shows per-category counts.

properties.tagline: كل مواعيدك في مكان واحد — جلسات، مهام، امتثال، اتصالات

nodes.label: Calendar Time Filter Tabs
nodes.description: Tab-based time range selector for the calendar: Today (1), Tomorrow (1), This Week (9), Next 30 Days (18), Previous (9). Default active tab is Today.

nodes.label: Calendar Event Summary Stats Bar
nodes.description: Horizontal badge row showing aggregate counts by event type: 29 events total, 6 case appointments, 10 tasks, 6 compliance deadlines (red warning), 7 contact calls.

nodes.label: Sanad Sidebar Navigation
nodes.description: Right-side vertical navigation menu in the Sanad lawyer app. Items: Dashboard, Clients, Cases Board, Communications, Documents, Invoices, Compliance (badge:4), Tasks (badge:9), Deep Work, Calendar (active). Badges on Compliance and Tasks indicate pending items.

nodes.label: Role Switcher (Lawyer / Student)
nodes.description: Top-bar toggle allowing the user to switch between Lawyer (محامي) and Student (طالب) modes. Currently active on Lawyer mode.

nodes.label: PWA / Local-First Architecture
nodes.description: Sanad is installable as a PWA (Progressive Web App) for desktop access. UI state and timer are stored locally, minimizing server load. Status bar confirms: 'محتسن للخادم المنزلي • PWA مفعل' (Optimized for home server, PWA enabled).

nodes.label: Calendar Event Card
nodes.description: Individual event card in the calendar list. Shows type badge (e.g., مهمة / Task), title, date/time, and a chevron for expansion. Red circle icon indicates urgency. Example: 'تحديث العميل بشأن صيديليات الخليج' (Update client regarding Gulf Pharmacies), due today 12:00 AM.
